news.t: CresAlta Marks Debut with Launch of Two Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: CVSM is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Morgan Stanley Instl Lqudty Govt Instl stock at 8.04%, BorgWarner at 3.94%, Sensata Technologies Holding at 2.80%, Dynatrace at 2.57%, and Huntington Ingalls Industries at 2.46%.

overview.description: The CresAlta Small and Mid-Cap ETF (CVSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed SMID-cap ETF focused on financially strong US companies with attractive valuations, improving fundamentals, and long-term shareholder value potential. CVSM was launched on May 18, 2026 and is issued by CresAlta.
